Re-verify before re-running: `from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM; AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained('Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct', revision='c90f8a5e40a75df38b88beb62efebaa5e5e2e4e4')`.

training_log_fields.note: No held-out validation split was used during training — all 279 pairs went to training. Convergence was monitored via training loss only (see training/training_run.log). A held-out validation curve is a v0.2 training improvement.
